Never visit, save your car.
Was very good service provider not so long ago. But now their services are just craps and of very very poor quality. They broke my engine cover during service, broke my tyre nuts during service, and I think they did it intentionally and bluntly asked me to buy new parts so that you can drive the car. The Manager was not so professional and ignorant. I wish I could give them less then 1 star.
Good experience, staff is cooperative. Genuine as well as non genuine parts are available. Prices are ok too. Maintenance packages are also reasonably priced.
Always go there for my wagon r service. They mostly offer good packages and look into the problem correctly
I didn't feel any difference between mini motors and other Suzuki service centers, Local garages and mechanics are way better than Suzuki service centers.
Masha'AllaH. Excellent Service & Cooperative Staff . Little bit expensive but excellent service .

For the very first inspection, I have to request for every work written in the check list. Not suitable for first and second free inspection. Their foreman is there for promoting their business and asks working parts to change at highest prices. It's better to get your car tunned here but for buying parts, you have to look other options as prices are too high. Looting customers in every possible way. Strongly discouraged to visit
Very professional staff with good techniques and skills
A place with Great people Specially Mr Usman Bhatti Shab, very cooperative & an efficient person.

They're always very busy and take too much time for small work.
It's better to avoid this place and go somewhere else
It's a good place to get your vehicle periodically maintained. Good job done everytime.

It one of the oldest Suzuki Show room in Lahore.

Got the car by Booking. Their sales staff are not cooperative. They always gave false statements and timelines. Secondly, they even took the initiative to facilitate.

Secondly, my car carpet was damaged at the time of delivery. So, everyone please make sure each and everything is in detail.

Once I had accidentally visited Suzuki Mini Motors on Sunday (because this is the only Suzuki dealer which was used to open on Sunday) and after that I had never visited any other Suzuki dealership for maintenance. I had visited it a few days ago and the experience was brilliant. I was just sitting in the waiting area and the whole process was carried out by the supervisor. I didn't had to get involved in the micromanagement of the tasks. Even if the customer is not satisfied, he/she can visit anytime soon and tell them. They will reevaluate and provide the remedy. Once I went back and told them that the balancing was not done in the right manner. The mechanic had crossed the  tyres and everything went fine.
I love the service and the behavior of the staff. Overall nothing to complain about.
??oodnplace, cooperative staff. Well trained for Suzuki Cars

Excellent service and cooperative staff 100% professional
Special Thanks to my Buddy  Usman Bhatti
Giood but always expensive depite using the same OEMs

Very Bad and Pathetic Experience. Would not recommend anyone going there.

Went to Suzuki Mini Motors another branch named Suzuki Pine Avenue Motors.

Went there and got x2 cars booked Alto VXR on different names and different bank drafts. But they called us back after few days that our booking has been withdrawn as suzuki believes that we are investors. They even charged us the insurance fee for both cars as according to their new policy they will charge insurance fee i.e. 2% of invoice price just to avoid investors.

I went there to take the information for a bike on installment. The customer service was 2/10, and was feeling like they don't want to deal.
Second, the policy of Suzuki for bike on installments,
You only can buy if you residing in Lahore and the permanent address must be Lahore. Otherwise you are not eligible.......
I make a request but they straight away Denied, and said, company policy. I am criticism company policy not mini motors...
Placed in a crowdy area of Lahore , not a easy access,
Would not suggest you to visit if you don't belongs to that place..

Suzuki Mini motors is a 3 star authorized dealer of Pak Suzuki Motors. It is located in Gulberg Lahore near Cavalry Ground. It offers sale of brand new cars of Suzuki vrans only and also provide car repair and maintenance service. Its workshop is very well equipped and its technician are very skilled and competent. It gives excellent service.

Suzuki Mini Motors is the worst Suzuki dealership in Lahore.

I won?? recommend anybody doing business with them at all. They aren?? trustworthy, highly deceptive, and unprofessional, especially their salesperson Mr. Summer and sales manager Mr. Kashif.

I booked the newly launched Swift in the Suzuki exchange program through Suzuki Mini Motors. They committed to deliver the vehicle within fifteen days but the vehicle was delivered after forty days.

The dealership handed me over a faulty vehicle with manufacturing defects and deep scratches on the paint.

A very good place very good service provider workshop is very well equipped  I go to sells department they are not welcome so I don't like it they don't bother if they see you are only hear for estimate of your car or ur mot gone buy today  so I specifically recommend thier workshop and body shop  very good staff and supervisor

I was charged for telling me that my CNG advance kit was faulty, which I already knew. Still I will advise to go to M. M.

But its very difficult to reach there for people coming from districts like Faisalabad, Sheikhupura and Gujranwala as people have to cross whole city to reach there. But its true that they have better staff and trusty owner.

Its better to get your oil changed/ tuning done/ parts replaced from an authorized dealer. Contrary to poular belief, they are not overpriced. However, unlike the mechanics, they do have a good quality of service. Suzuki Mini is all good.

Extremely bad service, they have no concern for customer service, they will make you wait for ages and never stay up with their commitments, they will take longer than the the time they have given to you, i had extremely bad experience with them, especially the body shop, they don?? value their customer, we spend 3,4 times higher at their workshop to get a good customer service but unfortunately they don?? value the customer and this happened with me when i was getting my car?? work on cash payment, if its insurance than they will treat you even worse, Usman butt is the in-charge of bodyshop who will try his best to make your drag dates and create inconvenience for you and later on will say its your fault.
